# confirm-specification-readiness
Description: Confirms that a set of specifications have been reviewed, corrected, and are ready for handover to the next stage or team.
Source: project
1. Review all specified documents or files, applying any necessary corrections or updates.
2. Ensure that all changes are saved and all files are correctly written to their designated storage location.
3. Verify the status of each individual document, noting whether it was approved, corrected, or newly created.
4. Confirm that any identified cross-document issues or dependencies have been resolved.
5. Once all checks are complete and statuses are confirmed, declare the set of documents ready for transfer or further processing by the next designated team or system.
